sentences.english: I can do whatever I want, whenever I want.
sentences.korean: 원할 때 원하는 걸 할 수 있어요.

sentences.english: I lived alone for a year and it got really lonely, especially on weekends.
sentences.korean: 1년 동안 혼자 살았는데 정말 외로웠어요, 특히 주말에요.

sentences.english: I ended up getting a roommate.
The hardest part of living alone is doing all the chores yourself, like cooking and cleaning every day.
sentences.korean: 혼자 사는 게 가장 힘든 건 모든 집안일을 혼자 하는 거예요. 매일 요리하고 청소하는 것 같은 거요.

quiz.question: What is the main topic of this passage?
